[![try/except style: tryceratops](https://img.shields.io/badge/try%2Fexcept%20style-tryceratops%20%F0%9F%A6%96%E2%9C%A8-black)](https://github.com/guilatrova/tryceratops)

### If you like the repo, it would be awesome if you could add a star to it! It really helps out the visibility. Also for any questions we'd love to hear from you at jfuruness@gmail.com

Welcome to BGPy! One of the worlds leading Python BGP security simulators. You're in good company; this simulator has been used by teams all around the world, including NIST. BGPy is also [peer-reviewed research](https://dl.acm.org/doi/fullHtml/10.1145/3607505.3607509) and has been featured in [several publications](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Citations-and-Use-Cases), with many more ongoing.

With BGPy, you can simulate the entire internet topology on your laptop. You can program your own security policies & attacks, use the topology for custom analysis, use real-world ROV data, etc. BGPy also comes with a custom test suite that allows for easy testing of security protocols. We support [more than 20 policies](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy_pkg/wiki/Routing-Policies) including ROV, ASPA,  and ASRA.

If you're looking for an in depth tutorial as to the features, and how to use BGPy, I highly recommend the [tutorial](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Tutorial).

If you're just looking to run/visualize attack/defense scenarios without programming, I recommend checking out the front-end for this tool: [BGPSimulator.com](https://www.bgpsimulator.com)

If you're looking to cite BGPy or check out the use cases, you can find that [here](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Citations-and-Use-Cases). If you end up citing BGPy please let us know and we'll add you to the list :)

##### Table of Contents

* [Tutorial](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Tutorial)
* [Citations and Use Cases](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Citations-and-Use-Cases)
* [Installation](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Installation)
* [Testing](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Testing)
* [Development/Contributing](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Development-Contributing)
* [History](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/History)
* [Credits](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Credits)
* [License](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/blob/master/LICENSE)
* [FAQ](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/FAQ)

### Si te gusta el repositorio, ¡sería increíble si pudieras agregarle una estrella! Realmente ayuda a la visibilidad. También, para cualquier pregunta, nos encantaría saber de ti en jfuruness@gmail.com

¡Bienvenido a BGPy! Uno de los principales simuladores de seguridad BGP en Python del mundo. Estás en buena compañía; este simulador ha sido usado por equipos de todo el mundo, incluido NIST. BGPy también es [investigación revisada por pares](https://dl.acm.org/doi/fullHtml/10.1145/3607505.3607509) y ha sido destacado en [varias publicaciones](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Citations-and-Use-Cases), con muchas más en curso.

Con BGPy, puedes simular toda la topología de internet en tu laptop. Puedes programar tus propias políticas de seguridad y ataques, usar la topología para análisis personalizados, usar datos reales de ROV, etc. BGPy también incluye un conjunto de pruebas personalizado que permite probar fácilmente los protocolos de seguridad. Soportamos [más de 20 políticas](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy_pkg/wiki/Routing-Policies) incluyendo ROV, ASPA y ASRA.

Si buscas un tutorial detallado sobre las funciones y cómo usar BGPy, recomiendo mucho el [tutorial](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Tutorial).

Si solo quieres ejecutar/visualizar escenarios de ataque/defensa sin programar, recomiendo echar un vistazo al front-end de esta herramienta: [BGPSimulator.com](https://www.bgpsimulator.com)

Si buscas citar BGPy o revisar los casos de uso, puedes encontrarlos [aquí](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Citations-and-Use-Cases). Si terminas citando BGPy, por favor avísanos y te añadiremos a la lista :)

##### Tabla de Contenidos

* [Tutorial](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Tutorial)
* [Citas y Casos de Uso](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Citations-and-Use-Cases)
* [Instalación](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Installation)
* [Pruebas](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Testing)
* [Desarrollo/Contribuciones](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Development-Contributing)
* [Historial](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/History)
* [Créditos](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/Credits)
* [Licencia](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/blob/master/LICENSE)
* [Preguntas Frecuentes](https://github.com/jfuruness/bgpy/wiki/FAQ)
